rubrics:
Вечірня: «Блажен муж». На «Господи, взиваю» - 8 стихир ап., Слава: ап., І нині: богородичний-догмат за гласом наславника. Вхід. Прокімен дня і три читання ап.: 1 Ів. 1:1-8, Як. 1:1-12, Юди. 1:1-25. Стиховня ап., зі своїми приспівами, Сл.: ап., І нині: богород. з неділ. стиховні за гласом наславника. Тропар ап., Слава, І нині: богород. з неділ. за гласом тропаря ап. Відпуст великий з помин. тільки служби ап.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар ап. (2), Слава, І нині: богород. з недільних за гласом тропаря ап. Катизма чергова з сідальними ап., також полієлей з величаннями. Степенна 4-го гласу, перший антифон. Прокімен, Єв. – Ів. 67 зач.; 21, 15-25. Пс. 50, і стихира ап. Канон Богородиці і ап. Катавасія: «Відкрию уста мої». По 3-ій пісні - сідальний ап. По 6-ій - кондак-ікос ап. По 9-ій – світильний ап. Хвалитні стихири ап. – 4. Слава: ап., І нині: богород. за гласом наславника. По великому славослов'ї з трисвятим – тропар ап., Слава, І нині: богород. з недільних за гласом тропаря ап. Відпуст великий з помин. тільки служби ап.
Часи: на всіх – тропар і кондак ап.
Літургія: все – тільки ап. Апостол і євангелія: Ряд.: Ап. – Флп. 242 зач.; 2, 16-23. Єв. – Лк. 27 зач.; 6, 37-45. Ап.: Ап. – 1 Кор. 131 зач.; 4, 9-16. Єв. – Ів. 65 зач.; 20, 19-31.

troparion_en.text: You evangelized the northern people of America and Asia, / proclaiming the Gospel of Christ to the natives in their own tongues. / Holy Hierarch Father Innocent, / enlightener of Alaska and all America, / your ways were ordered by the Lord! / Pray to Him for the salvation of our souls in His heavenly Kingdom!

kontakion_en.text: A true celebration of the providence and grace of God / is your life, O Holy Father Innocent, Apostle to our land. / In hardships and dangers you toiled for the Gospel’s sake / and God delivered and preserved you unharmed. / From obscurity He highly exalted you as an example / that the Lord truly guides a man in the way he should go.

matched_oca_saint: Glorification of Saint Innocent, Metropolitan of Moscow, Enlightener of the Aleuts, Apostle to the Americas

oca_saints.name: Glorification of Saint Innocent, Metropolitan of Moscow, Enlightener of the Aleuts, Apostle to the Americas

troparion.text: You evangelized the northern people of America and Asia, / proclaiming the Gospel of Christ to the natives in their own tongues. / Holy Hierarch Father Innocent, / enlightener of Alaska and all America, / your ways were ordered by the Lord! / Pray to Him for the salvation of our souls in His heavenly Kingdom!

kontakion.text: A true celebration of the providence and grace of God / is your life, O Holy Father Innocent, Apostle to our land. / In hardships and dangers you toiled for the Gospel’s sake / and God delivered and preserved you unharmed. / From obscurity He highly exalted you as an example / that the Lord truly guides a man in the way he should go.

troparion.text: You were a disciple of Christ, / and a member of the divine college of Apostles. / Having been weak in faith you doubted the Resurrection of Christ, / but by feeling the wounds you believed in His all-pure Passion: / pray now to Him, O all-praised Thomas, to grant us peace and great mercy.

kontakion.text: Thomas, the faithful servant and disciple of Christ, / filled with divine grace, cried out from the depth of his love: / “You are my Lord and my God!”

oca_saints.name: Monastic Martyr Macarius of Saint Anne Skete, Mount Athos

troparion.text: The image of God was truly preserved in you, O Father, / for you took up the Cross and followed Christ. / By so doing you taught us to disregard the flesh for it passes away / but to care instead for the soul, since it is immortal. / Therefore your spirit, venerable Macarius, rejoices with the angels.

kontakion.text: As a venerable and proven ascetic, as an honorable and renowned martyr,  / and as a model of the desert life, O most exalted Macarius, /  we sing hymns of praise to you,  / for you have trampled upon serpents.
